title: Netify Agent Status Telemetry
description: JSON Schema for Netify Agent v5 status and performance statistics telemetry.

agent_version.description: Semantic version of the running Netify Agent.

build_version.description: Full agent build string including platform and enabled feature flags.

cpu_cores.description: Number of CPU cores available to the agent process.

cpu_system.description: Current cumulative system CPU usage reported by the agent.

cpu_user.description: Current cumulative user CPU usage reported by the agent.

dhc_status.description: Status flag for the DNS hint cache subsystem.

fhc_status.description: Status flag for the flow hash cache subsystem.

flows_expired.description: Number of flows that have expired.

flows_expiring.description: Number of flows currently in the process of expiring.

flows_in_use.description: Number of flow table entries currently in use.

flows_purged.description: Number of flows purged by maintenance routines.

maxrss_kb.description: Current high-water resident set size in kilobytes.

maxrss_kb_prev.description: Previous high-water resident set size sample in kilobytes.

memrss_kb.description: Current resident memory usage in kilobytes.

memrss_kb_prev.description: Previous resident memory usage sample in kilobytes.

tcm_kb_prev.description: Previous TCMalloc-managed memory sample in kilobytes.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch timestamp (seconds) when the status record was generated.

update_imf.description: Internal update indicator for incremental maintenance/metrics refresh.
